message:
feat(fsqlite-pager): rollback journal format + lock-byte page (bd-188d)

Add journal.rs module with JournalHeader encode/decode, JournalPageRecord
with stride-200 checksum (data[0] never sampled), lock_byte_page()
calculation, and comprehensive error types. Also include other agents'
BOCPD and index-regen modules from fsqlite-mvcc. 30 new pager tests,
105 total passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +1,9 @@
 /index.html
-  Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
+  Cache-Control: no-cache
 
 /spec_evolution.html
-  Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
+  Cache-Control: no-cache
 
 /*.sqlite3
   Content-Type: application/octet-stream
-  Content-Disposition: inline
-  Cache-Control: public, max-age=86400
-  Accept-Ranges: none
   X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
